title: elaphoglossum alcicorne
intro: Elaphoglossum alcicorne is a species of epiphytic fern, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum alcicorne include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
